narrative:
Licking Twp township has 3,632 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.9 percentage points.
